name: Candy-Covered Berries
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash strawberries and gently pat dry.
2. Line a tray with waxed paper.
3. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips and 1 tsp oil, stirring occasionally until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and set the saucepan in a pan of hot water to maintain dipping consistency.
5. Dip 18 strawberries into the chocolate mixture until about 2/3 of each strawberry is coated. Allow excess chocolate to drip off and place the strawberries stem side down on the paper-lined tray.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. Repeat with remaining strawberries, using vanilla milk chips and 1 1/2 tsp oil.
8. For pastel-colored coating, add 2 to 5 drops of any food color to the melted vanilla milk chip mixture.
